failures.description: The agent misread or misused the ProductCatalogSearch result and selected the wrong item as cheapest. The correct answer should have been item 1240311797 at $137.17, not item 2243454707 at $164.46.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to answer the cheapest available Electric Kettle using the ProductCatalogSearch evidence. The relevant tool output was available at index 3 and was sorted by price ascending, with item 1240311797 priced at $137.17 as the cheapest. At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer using item 2243454707 at $164.46, which is the last and most expensive returned item, contradicting the tool output. This is not an invalid tool invocation or unsupported intent; it is a reasoning error over the returned evidence.
